name: Caramel Apple Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients except peanuts and apples in a bowl.
2. Mix until smooth.
3. Stir in chopped peanuts.
4. Chill.
5. Just before serving, slice apples and arrange around the dip.
Variation: Substitute 1 can (8oz) crushed pineapple, drained for the apple butter.
From: Sarah Gruenwald
Pampered Chef Consultant
